type_ia.name: Type IA Variation
type_ia.description: Minor variation requiring no prior approval. Notification within 12 months.
examples: Minor change to address of manufacturer

type_ib.name: Type IB Variation
type_ib.description: Minor variation requiring notification. Implementation 30 days after notification.
examples: Change in supplier of excipient (within monograph)
Minor change in manufacturing process not affecting quality

type_ii.name: Type II Variation
type_ii.description: Major variation requiring prior approval before implementation.
examples: Change in manufacturing site of active substance
